mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.phone, u.password, u.role, u.credit_score AS creditScore, u.status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_favorite f WHERE f.user_id = u.id) AS collectCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_follow fw WHERE fw.user_id = u.id) AS followCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_order o WHERE o.user_id = u.id) AS orderCount, u.create_time AS createTime, u.update_time AS updateTime FROM t_user u WHERE u.id = #{id}

SELECT u.id, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.phone, u.password, u.role, u.credit_score AS creditScore, u.status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_favorite f WHERE f.user_id = u.id) AS collectCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_follow fw WHERE fw.user_id = u.id) AS followCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_order o WHERE o.user_id = u.id) AS orderCount, u.create_time AS createTime, u.update_time AS updateTime FROM t_user u WHERE u.phone = #{phone}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user (nickname, avatar, phone, password, role, credit_score, status) VALUES (#{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{phone}, #{password}, COALESCE(#{role}, 'user'), COALESCE(#{creditScore}, 100), COALESCE(#{status}, 'active'))
mapper.update: UPDATE t_user SET nickname = #{nickname}, avatar = #{avatar}, phone = #{phone}, role = #{role}, credit_score = #{creditScore}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.phone, u.password, u.role, u.credit_score AS creditScore, u.status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_favorite f WHERE f.user_id = u.id) AS collectCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_follow fw WHERE fw.user_id = u.id) AS followCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_order o WHERE o.user_id = u.id) AS orderCount, u.create_time AS createTime, u.update_time AS updateTime FROM t_user u ORDER BY u.id

SELECT u.id, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.phone, u.password, u.role, u.credit_score AS creditScore, u.status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_favorite f WHERE f.user_id = u.id) AS collectCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_follow fw WHERE fw.user_id = u.id) AS followCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_order o WHERE o.user_id = u.id) AS orderCount, u.create_time AS createTime, u.update_time AS updateTime FROM t_user u WHERE u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY u.id LIMIT 20
